let success = 0, fail = 0;
for \(const [srcRel, destFile] of mapping\) {
  const src = path.join\(SRC, srcRel\);
  const dst = path.join\(DEST, destFile\);
  try {
    fs.copyFileSync\(src, dst\);
    success++;
  } catch\(e\) {
    console.log\('FAILED:', srcRel, '->', e.message\);
    fail++;
  }
}
console.log\('Copied:', success, 'Failed:', fail\);
")
Bash(cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_DOMAIN=pos.barmagly.tech npx expo export -p web)

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_HFhrVY7sSDp3@ep-polished-sun-amr4cmn7.c-5.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require" npx tsx -e "import\(''''./server/seedPizzaLemon.ts''''\).then\(m => m.seedPizzaLemon\(\)\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''''DONE''''\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
